name: C2xSetMapObjectBmpFilePath
title: C2xSetMapObjectBmpFilePath
syntax: long C2xSetMapObjectBmpFilePath( long handle, char filePath[] );
description: Sets the file path to a bitmap for a map object of the type bitmap.
For transparency pure white color (RGB 255, 255, 255) is used.
return: 0 if success, else the set went wrong
